name: Brown Bagger's White Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Milk (add 2 tbsp more water - DAK/Welbilt mach)
1 1/2 tsp Red star yeast (2 tsp for DAK/Welbilt; 3 tsp for Panasonic/Nat'l)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread machine pan.
2. Select Light Crust setting.
3. Press Start to begin baking.
Note: This bread slices well and stays fairly moist, although it doesn't last long. The potato flakes help make it moist.
